programme.title: Ça se passe sur beIN SPORTS
Football : Ligue 2 BKT
programme.desc: C'est le choc de cette 26e journée de Ligue 2 BKT entre Saint-Etienne et le Red Star. Les deux prétendants à la montée en Ligue 1 s'affrontent à Geoffroy Guichard devant un public acquis à la cause des Verts, emmenés par leur ailier géorgien Zuriko Davitashvili qui retrouve de sa superbe.

programme.desc: Déjà tombeur de Nottingham Forest, formation de Premier League, au troisième tour (3-3, 4-3 aux t.a.b.), le club gallois de l'AFC Wrexham va, cette fois, recevoir un cador de l'élite anglaise, Chelsea, pour le compte des 8es de finale de la Coupe d'Angleterre. programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Liverpool v Cardiff City. Action from the 20212 final at Wembley Stadium. The Reds had defeated the likes of Stoke City, Chelsea and Manchester City to reach the final and went into the match as clear favourites in their first visit to the national stadium since it was rebuilt. However, the Bluebirds, who defeated Crystal Palace on penalties in the semi-finals, had been in good form in the Champio

programme.title: Live EFL
programme.desc: AFC Wimbledon V Northampton Town (Kick-off 12.00pm). Coverage of the League One match at Cherry Red Records Stadium. Northampton have already defeated the dons twice this season, prevailing 3-1 at Sixfields in the league in December and 2-1 here in the Football League Trophy last month, and they are in need of another result to boost their chances of avoiding relegation.

programme.title: Live EFL
programme.desc: Queens Park Rangers v Middlesbrough (Kick-off 4.30pm). Coverage of the Championship match at MATRADE Loftus Road Stadium. Middlesbrough claimed a 3-1 win in December's reverse fixture at Riverside Stadium and they will expect another three points today as they continue their title challenge.

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Swansea City. Highlights of the 2013 final at Wembley Stadium, where the League Two Bantams were aiming to produce yet another cup upset. Swansea were appearing in their first major cup final and beat Chelsea in the semi-finals to reach this stage, but Bradford had stolen most of the headlines in the competition this season, belying their lowly league status to eliminate the likes

programme.title: SPFL: Old Firm Derby Best Goals
programme.desc: A look at some of the very best goals scored in Old Firm derby clashes between Celtic and Rangers over the years.

display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: New: Saturday Social - Live
programme.desc: Luca, Faysal and Flav Bateman join Smithy and Joe this week. Plus, Everton and England number one Jordan Pickford takes on the Autocomplete challenge and much more.

programme.title: PL Stories: PGMO & IWD
programme.desc: Mark International Women's Day by spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: Relive the action from the Premier League in a unique way with fast-paced highlights using alternative angles, featuring every goal from every game.

programme.title: Gillette Soccer Saturday Pre-Match
programme.desc: Build up to the afternoon's football with in-depth interviews and features from the biggest names in the Premier League, EFL and Scotland.

programme.title: Gillette Soccer Saturday Pre-Match
programme.desc: Build up to the afternoon's football with in-depth interviews and features from the biggest names in the Premier League, EFL and Scotland.

programme.title: Gillette Soccer Sat: Live Scores
programme.desc: Stay up to speed with the afternoon's football up and down the country as goals go in and updates arrive in the studio from around the grounds.

programme.title: Premier League Years 2023-2024
programme.desc: Revisit the annals of Premier League history with the 2023-2024 season, a campaign that saw Manchester City go one step further, winning an unprecedented fourth-successive top-flight title.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: PL Stories: PGMO & IWD
programme.desc: Mark International Women's Day by spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

programme.title: Big Interview: Ryan Gravenberch
programme.desc: Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch joins fellow Premier League winner Owen Hargreaves as the pair discuss football, identity and the craft of playing in the middle of the park.

programme.title: Transfer 360: Gareth Barry
programme.desc: Find out the inside story on Premier League record-appearance-holder Gareth Barry's failed move from Aston Villa to Liverpool and how Manchester City swooped in instead.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: Premier League Years 2023-2024
programme.desc: Revisit the annals of Premier League history with the 2023-2024 season, a campaign that saw Manchester City go one step further, winning an unprecedented fourth-successive top-flight title.

programme.title: PL Retro: Bolton v Chelsea 2005
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League clash. Here, Chelsea look to claim a first Premier League title in 50 years as they visit Bolton towards the end of the 2004-05 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '14
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Man United host Liverpool in March 2014 in a remarkable contest that saw the visitors awarded three penalties.

programme.title: PL Greatest : Chelsea/Man Utd 2012
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 2012 for a memorable, ill-tempered clash between high-flying Chelsea and Man Utd at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: PL Greatest : Man Utd/Chelsea 2014
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 2014 for a pulsating encounter between Manchester United and Chelsea at Old Trafford.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '10
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Manchester United meet Liverpool in 2010, with a Dimitar Berbatov hat-trick proving the difference between the two teams.

programme.title: Best Premier League Goals 92/93
programme.desc: Sky Sports takes a look at some of the best goals from Premier League seasons in years gone by. Here, some of the best goals from the Premier League's first season - the 92-93 campaign.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Tottenham v Chelsea
programme.desc: A chance to look back at some of the best goals from previous Premier League meetings between Tottenham and Chelsea.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Merseyside Derby
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best goals scored in seasons gone by in the Premier League. Here, a Merseyside derby special with all the best goals in matches between Liverpool and Everton.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Spurs v United '96
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 1996 and a memorable match between Tottenham and Manchester United at White Hart Lane.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Spurs v ManU '01
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 2001 and a thrilling eight-goal encounter between Tottenham and Man Utd at White Hart Lane.

programme.title: PL Greatest: United v Spurs '12
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 2012 and a thrilling five-goal game between Man Utd and Tottenham Hotspur at Old Trafford.

programme.title: PL Greatest : Chelsea/Man Utd 2016
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 2016 as Jose Mourinho returns to Stamford Bridge with his Manchester United side to face Chelsea.

programme.title: PL Stories: PGMO & IWD
programme.desc: Mark International Women's Day by spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

programme.title: Big Interview: Ryan Gravenberch
programme.desc: Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch joins fellow Premier League winner Owen Hargreaves as the pair discuss football, identity and the craft of playing in the middle of the park.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: Sunday Supplement
programme.desc: The UK's top sports journalists dissect the stories in the Sunday newspapers, offering insight, opinion and in-depth analysis. Essential viewing for fans who want more than just the score.

programme.title: Premier League Years 2024-2025
programme.desc: In a year that saw number 20 take on a new, profound meaning for Liverpool Football Club, revisit the annals of Premier League history with a look at the 2024-2025 season.

programme.title: PL Stories: PGMO & IWD
programme.desc: Mark International Women's Day by spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: PL Stories: PGMO & IWD
programme.desc: Mark International Women's Day by spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

programme.title: Big Interview: Ryan Gravenberch
programme.desc: Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch joins fellow Premier League winner Owen Hargreaves as the pair discuss football, identity and the craft of playing in the middle of the park.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: Transfer 360: Gareth Barry
programme.desc: Find out the inside story on Premier League record-appearance-holder Gareth Barry's failed move from Aston Villa to Liverpool and how Manchester City swooped in instead.

programme.title: Premier League Years 2024-2025
programme.desc: In a year that saw number 20 take on a new, profound meaning for Liverpool Football Club, revisit the annals of Premier League history with a look at the 2024-2025 season.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: Relive the action from the Premier League in a unique way with fast-paced highlights using alternative angles, featuring every goal from every game.

programme.title: PL Stories: PGMO & IWD
programme.desc: Mark International Women's Day by spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Indian Wells: Svrcina v Sinner
programme.desc: World number two Jannik Sinner - yet to taste success in the Californian desert - gets underway at Indian Wells against Dalibor Svrcina. Sinner is a two-time semi-finalist here. (06.03)

programme.title: WTA Final: Doha
programme.desc: Victoria Mboko, one of the game's rising stars, eyes her second WTA 1000 crown after last year's Montreal breakthrough as the 19-year-old meets Karolina Muchova. (14.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Doha
programme.desc: Standing between Carlos Alcaraz, in the midst of an 11-game winning run, and a maiden Qatar Open title is the resurgent Arthur Fils - playing in his first final since 2024. (21.02)

programme.title: Indian Wells: Tie Break Tens
programme.desc: On the eve of the Indian Wells, Tie Break Tens returns for a showcase of fast-paced, high-energy, winner-take-all tennis in a mixed-doubles format.

programme.title: Indian Wells: Raducanu v Zakharova
programme.desc: The British number one Emma Raducanu, seeded 25th at the WTA 1000 event, opens her campaign in a clash with Anastasia Zakharova for a place in round three. (06.03)

programme.title: Indian Wells: Svrcina v Sinner
programme.desc: World number two Jannik Sinner - yet to taste success in the Californian desert - gets underway at Indian Wells against Dalibor Svrcina. Sinner is a two-time semi-finalist here. (06.03)

programme.title: Live: ATP/WTA Indian Wells
programme.desc: Enjoy live action from the ATP and WTA Tours.

programme.title: Live: ATP/WTA Indian Wells
programme.desc: Enjoy live action from the ATP and WTA Tours.

programme.title: ATP Final: Rotterdam
programme.desc: Top seed Alex de Minaur competes in his third consecutive Rotterdam final as former champion Felix Auger-Aliassime bids to deny the Australian a long-awaited trophy at the ATP 500. (15.02)

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Revisit a standout match from yesterday's action on the WTA and ATP Tours.

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Revisit a standout match from yesterday's action on the WTA and ATP Tours.

programme.title: WTA Final: Ostrava
programme.desc: Katie Boulter targets her fourth career title as the former world number 23 faces Germany's Tamara Korpatsch in the Ostrava final. Boulter will return to the top 100 with victory. (07.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Dubai
programme.desc: Meeting for the first time in a final, 31-year-olds Jessica Pegula and Elina Svitolina vie for the Dubai crown. Svitolina bids to end an eight-year wait for her third title here. (21.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Dallas
programme.desc: Taylor Fritz and Ben Shelton - the Dallas top two - vie for the crown. Fritz downed Marin Cilic in the semi-finals, while Shelton dethroned reigning champion Denis Shapovalov. (15.02)

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Revisit a standout match from yesterday's action on the WTA and ATP Tours.

programme.title: Live Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Newcastle United v Manchester City (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage from the fifth-round match from St. James' Park. This is the fifth meeting between the two clubs inside the last four months, having faced each other twice in the league and twice in the League Cup semi-finals. programme.title: Live Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Wrexham v Chelsea (Kick-off 5.45pm). Coverage from the fifth-round match from StoK Racecourse, as Liam Rosenior's side travel to the Championship club. programme.desc: Fulham v Southampton (Kick-off 12.00pm). Coverage from the fifth-round match from Craven Cottage. programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: CHE v NEW
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2011/2012 season.

programme.title: REVIEW - THU 06 MAR
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW29 Leeds United v Sunderland
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: THE MIDWEEK WRAP - THU 05 MAR
programme.desc: The Midweek Wrap features comprehensive match highlights, the best post-match reaction and expert analysis from a high-class team of pundits.
